description_long: This object is a single retro-style quad roller skate, featuring a high-top boot design with a vibrant blue and mustard yellow color scheme. The boot is constructed with a smooth synthetic or leather-like material, detailed with blue laces threaded through metal eyelets and a padded blue collar for ankle support. The side of the boot displays a circular patch with the text '1957 Roller Skate' and a stylized wheel graphic, adding a vintage flair. The skate is mounted on a sturdy black chassis with four large yellow wheels and visible metal axles, providing stability and smooth rolling. The toe area is reinforced, and the heel includes a pull loop for easy wearing. The overall design is both functional and visually striking, suitable for recreational or urban skating.
description: A retro quad roller skate with a blue and yellow high-top boot, blue laces, and four yellow wheels on a black chassis. Features a vintage patch and padded collar for support.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue padded tongue, tightly laced blue laces, and the rounded yellow toe with visible front wheels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the '1957 Roller Skate' patch, the blue and yellow color blocking, and the full profile of the four yellow wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the vertical yellow stripe, padded blue collar, and the alignment of the wheels from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the color pattern, laces, and wheel arrangement without the visible patch.
attribute_roller_skates: Quad roller skates with four yellow wheels, a blue and yellow high-top boot, blue laces, metal eyelets, a padded collar, and a vintage '1957 Roller Skate' patch on the side.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing is visible; only the roller skate itself is present, featuring a retro, sporty design with bold color blocking and classic detailing.
attribute_pose: No figure is present; only a single roller skate is shown, upright and ready for use.
